items.title: White / Church Wedding
items.location: St. Patrick's Cathedral, 1118 N. Mesa St, El Paso, TX 79902
items.description: Ceremony at St. Patrick's Cathedral. Please arrive 20 to 30 minutes early so everyone is seated before procession.

items.title: Reception / Traditional Wedding

items.title: After Party
items.description: After-party celebration following the reception. Final location will be shared with guests.
